text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (My father is a very kind man.)

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Huh, they gave me the wrong change... Oh well. Everyone makes
mistakes, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Dad, if you don't speak up, the shopkeeper will probably get in
trouble after they count up the money.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. They tally the amounts at the end of the day, don't they.
Thanks, Flower. I'll let them know.
Uh... Excuse me. I'm sorry, but—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (He's so kind, he'll apologize even for things that aren't his fault.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (My mother is a very warmhearted Umamusume.)

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh good, they still have the limited edition macarons! We can buy
some to share.
Excuse me, could I get—

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, they still have the limited flavors! I've been wanting to try
them ever since I saw them in a magazine... Oh! S-sorry. Were you
going to buy them?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, er... No. Not at all. I was just browsing...
Sorry, Flower... Why don't we find another dessert?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Mom, you said you wanted to try those macarons... Should I let
the lady know I want to buy them?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it, dear. We should let someone who really wants
the macarons have them. More importantly, is there something you
want to eat?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (She's the kind of person who'll always put others before herself.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But sometimes, my kind and warmhearted parents would look at me
with a sad, apologetic look in their eyes.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "We're sorry we can't do more for you."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But you do more than enough. Whenever I'm with you, my heart feels
as warm as a spring breeze. That's why I want you to keep
smiling—your smiles are like the sun to me.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I wondered what I could do to make them smile. One day, the answer
came to me.)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The contestants in the Li'l Runners exhibition race are really giving it
their all! Oh? What's this? Nishino Flower closes the distance at
lightning speed, getting in front!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Flower... She's looking straight ahead at the finish line. I've never
seen her look so confident...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Amazing... The way she's running right past everyone without worrying
about what's going on around her...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text: Flower! You've got this! We believe in you, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're almost there! Just one more burst of speed and—yes! Way to
go, Flower! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Look at her go! She's flying ahead of the pack! And there you have it! Nishino Flower crosses the finish line to take first place!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew. Mom, Dad, I'm back. I was really surprised to hear your cheers! I don't think I've ever heard you yell like that—

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
You were incredible! Who knew there was so much power hiding in
that little body! I can't even begin to tell you how happy I am... I'm so
proud of you!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I feel the exact same way! The cheers from the crowd were deafening!
We're so proud—we couldn't help telling everyone how amazing our
little girl is!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to describe, but seeing you race gave me a burst of
confidence. It was really something, seeing our little treasure shine so
brightly.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. You gave us courage. There's no need to hide ourselves, to
make ourselves small—we should be holding our heads up high
instead.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...My running... did that?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(My kind and warmhearted parents were smiling brightly, like the sun
over a field of flowers.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom! Dad! I... I want to run more! I want to enter more races!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Then you have our full support! You'll need a good pair of shoes first.
And you'll also need...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
A place where you can train and run to your heart's content! We might
as well buy some land, big enough to build facilities on and—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(If seeing me run makes my parents smile like that, then I want to run
lots. I want everyone who sees me to sparkle like the sun.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(If I can give everyone courage by racing... and if I can keep making
Mom and Dad happy like this...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Then I'll make it my dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How long has it been since I came to the academy as a trainer? As
usual, after the tryouts, I approach prospective trainees.
choice_data_list: Hi, could I have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! I've already chosen someone. It's just that... I'd prefer to work
with a seasoned trainer...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text:
Um, you're a new trainer, right? I'm sorry... Now's not a good time for
me...

text_block_list.name: Senior Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, no need to get so down in the dumps! Keep at it, and I'm sure
you'll find your perfect trainee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know that many new trainers face the same hurdle, but it still hurts
knowing just how much my lack of experience is holding me back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Still feeling blue, I walk the academy grounds in a daze, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I trip over my own two feet and crash to the ground. Looking at my
throbbing, skinned knee, my mood sinks even lower.
A-are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh no! You're hurt... Can you make it over to that bench?
choice_data_list: I'm fine. Don't worry about me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But that scrape looks really painful... Oh, feel free to lean on my
shoulder! It's all right, I am an Umamusume after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making sure I'm not hurt otherwise, she begins expertly patching
up my knee. I watch her work, impressed with her efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There. I've disinfected the wound and put a bandage over it. Um, I
hope that helped. Can you walk?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're welcome. You should head to the infirmary if it still
hurts, though. Well, goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stare at the cutesy floral print bandage on my knee. That girl looked
awfully young, but she was wearing the Tracen Academy uniform, so
she must be a student.
choice_data_list: That was really nice of her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I didn't exactly put my best foot forward back there, her
kindness soothed a bit of my melancholy.
